title: ANC - Switch from ANC Mode to Transparency Mode
scenario: Transparency Mode fails to default to Environment sub-setting when switching from ANC Mode in Device Settings
steps: Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Ensure ANC Mode is currently ON (e.g., Adaptive or Standard selected)
Tap on Transparency Mode to switch from ANC Mode to Transparency Mode
expected: Transparency Mode turns ON with "Environment" selected by default (if first switch). ANC Mode turns OFF and its previously selected value (Adaptive or Standard) is greyed out/disabled.
